posts.author: vnktshb
posts.text: Guidance for FY27 is super strong Management repeatedly guided FY’27 as “exceptional” with 60%–70% growth (explicitly value growth ). EBITDA margin guidance of flat to 50 bps improvement Company delivered Rs138crs in FY26. Assuming 70% PAT growth FY27E PAT likely to be Rs 235crs. The stock at current market cap of Rs5659crs trade at a P/E multiple of 24x which is super cheap for an alcohol stock. Fairly confident stock should double in 1 year. Disclosure: Invested
